captions.text: this intro is itself a Kinema project — projects/intro in the repo
ask Claude — the in-repo video-project skill teaches it the format

lines.text: This is Kinema, a small studio for making videos out of web files.
Everything you're watching right now is HTML and CSS.
A video is a folder of scenes, and every scene is three files.
Markup, styles, and a bit of JSON that says what happens when.
And you don't write these by hand: an AI skill in the repo drafts the whole video for you.
